## **Bugs and stability** {#theme-bugs_stability}

   **Bugs and stability.**
      3 recent review(s) mention bugs and stability.
      Review window: Jan 30, 2026 - Jul 20, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _maximilian dettori_, Jul 12, 2026, 1/5: "Always used Claude with female voice with Italian language. Suddenly all voices disappeared and there is now only one male voice left. Why??!! Very disappointed with this. Many issues with response time, often takes to long to get an answer. Many times it takes the first input by voice and than it doesn't work anymore. It's a real pity, it could be the best AI on the market."
            2. _mac bury_, Jul 1, 2026, 1/5: "App constantly crashes :( just install PWA of web version it is even worse now with crashing. models response is smug and it does not answer questions"
            3. _67gonner_, Jul 1, 2026, 1/5: "I can’t enter Claude it just says reload and I can’t get in. It is a good ai but that is just a weird glitch"
